titleStmt.title: SII 22.243: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 243. (A.R. No. 243 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA.

summary.p: This is also dated merely in the cyclic year Vikāri, Māśi, Śivarātri. The writing seems to be of a later date than in No. 242 above. The inscription records the consecration of the images of Dakshiṇāmūrthi, Mahā-Vishṇu, Brahmā and Durgā (in the niches round the central shrine) in which the temple was hitherto wanting, and the provision made for their worship by land and money gifts by one Veṇṇaikkūttaṉ, son of Anantaṉ of the Ātrēya-gōtra, a resident of Īchchambāḍi. Mention is made of another donor also by name Veṅgappar-Piḷḷai, who is said to have given his magamai and uḷḷāyam incomes for an additional worship in the evenings to Dakshiṇāmūrthi and for offerings during the sacred bath on Fridays of the god and goddess in the main shrine.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vikāri varuṣam māci mātam civarāttirai puṇṇiyakālattile
Īccampāṭi Āttiṟaya gottirattil Aṉantaṉ puttiraṉ
veṇṇaikkūttaṉ tiruppaṉaiṅkāvuṭaiya nayiṉār ko
yilukku tevakuṭi nāyamār Aṉṟiyile Irukkaiyil taṅka
ḷiṭa Upaiyamāka tekṣaṇāmuṟttinayiṉārum makāviṣṇuvum piṟum
māvum tuṟkāteviyum Eḻuntaruḷappaṇṇi naivettiyattu
kku tekṣaṇāmuṟtti nayiṉāṟku muṉṟu cantikku Arici muṉṉāḻiyum tuṟkā tevikku
Arici nāḻiyum Āka Arici nāṉāḻikku Añciliraṇṭuppaṭikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku I 3 �
Āka varuṣam 1- ku I 3 10 7 ḷa ku maṅaru viṭṭa Ettattaṉūr pututiruttu nantavaṉappa
yaṭai ku 2 100 6 10 5 pū 2 10 5 I 10 8 ḷa kaṇṇappaṉ tiruttu ku 100i varuṣakkutta
kai I 4 ḷa kaḷaṟpaṭṭai ku 100 10 5 varuṣakkuttakai I 6ḷalā malaippaṭṭa
ṭai tiraippulam ku 8 10kku varuṣakkuttakai I ku 100 vaḻutilaimeṭu ku 100 10 varuṣa
kkuttakai I lāgamaṅa vaṉpākkam melpākkam
tiruviḷakkukku tekṣaṇāmurttinayiṉāṟku pakal viḷakku 10 5 yinta nāyamā
ṟku yirāttiri viḷakku 3kkum viṭṭa kavaraitteru tāṟu— 5i � 10 periya kollai
nilam 3 vāṉavāri nilam � 1i terppaṭikkollai nilam � I Āka � 10 5m nilaṅkaḷ U
ṇṭāṉatum Āsantiṟāṟkamum naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum tekṣaṇāmuṟt
tinayiṉāṟku tiṉam tiruvantikkāppu naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum makamai Uḷḷā
yam veṅkappar piḷḷai taṉmamāka tampirāṉāṟkum nāccimāṟkum comavā
ram cukkiṟavārattukku Apiṣekattukku teṅkāy paḻam cakkarai viṭṭa maka
mai Uḷḷāyamum Āsantiṟāṟkamum naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum yitukku yātorut
tar Akitam niṉaittavar kaṅkaikkaraiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa toṣatti
lum taṉṉiṭa mātā pitāvait taṉ kaiyyāra vataitta toṣattilum pokak
kaṭavarkaḷākavum .
Digital edition of SII 22.243 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
